languages.text: {n}Яруб понижает голос до шепота и нервно оглядывается.{/n} "Вы же не передумали?"
{n}Jarub lowers his voice to a whisper and looks around uneasily.{/n} "You haven't changed your mind, have you?"
languages.original_text: {n}Яруб понижает голос до шепота и нервно оглядывается.{/n} "Вы же не передумали?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub lowers his voice to a whisper and looks around uneasily.{/n} "You haven't changed your mind, have you?"
{n}Jarub lowers his voice to a whisper and looks around uneasily.{/n} "You haven't changed your mind, have you?"
{n}Jarub lowers his voice to a whisper and looks around uneasily.{/n} "You haven't changed your mind, have you?"

languages.text: {n}Jarub convierte su voz en un susurro y mira a su alrededor, inquieto.{/n} «No ha cambiado de idea, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lowers his voice to a whisper and looks around uneasily.{/n} "You haven't changed your mind, have you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub convierte su voz en un susurro y mira a su alrededor, inquieto.{/n} «No ha cambiado de idea, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: {n}雅鲁布压低声音，不安地四下张望。{/n}“您没改变主意吧？”
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lowers his voice to a whisper and looks around uneasily.{/n} "You haven't changed your mind, have you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}雅鲁布压低声音，不安地四下张望。{/n}“您没改变主意吧？”

languages.text: {n}Jarub baisse la voix et se met à murmurer tout en dardant des regards craintifs autour de lui.{/n} « Vous avez pas changé d'avis, au moins ? »
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lowers his voice to a whisper and looks around uneasily.{/n} "You haven't changed your mind, have you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub baisse la voix et se met à murmurer tout en dardant des regards craintifs autour de lui.{/n} « Vous avez pas changé d'avis, au moins ? »

languages.text: {n}Jarub, huzursuzca etrafına bakınıp fısıldayacak kadar kısık sesle konuşuyor.{/n} "Fikrinizi değiştirmediniz, değil mi?"
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lowers his voice to a whisper and looks around uneasily.{/n} "You haven't changed your mind, have you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub, huzursuzca etrafına bakınıp fısıldayacak kadar kısık sesle konuşuyor.{/n} "Fikrinizi değiştirmediniz, değil mi?"

languages.text: {n}Jarub senkt seine Stimme zu einem Flüstern und sieht sich nervös um.{/n} "Ihr habt es Euch doch nicht anders überlegt, oder?"
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lowers his voice to a whisper and looks around uneasily.{/n} "You haven't changed your mind, have you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub senkt seine Stimme zu einem Flüstern und sieht sich nervös um.{/n} "Ihr habt es Euch doch nicht anders überlegt, oder?"

languages.text: {n}ジャラブは声のトーンを下げ、不安そうに周囲を見渡した。{/n}「君、考え直したんじゃないよね？」
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub lowers his voice to a whisper and looks around uneasily.{/n} "You haven't changed your mind, have you?"
